---
title: "Articles"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description]
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
---

Longer-form articles and tutorials about rig.

To add an article, drop a new `.qmd` file in `website/articles/` with a
`title`, `date` and `description` in its front matter; it will appear in the
list above automatically.

## Blog posts and external articles

Posts published elsewhere:

<!-- Add external links here, for example:
- [Managing R versions with rig](https://example.com/post) — Example Blog, 2024
-->

_None yet._
